'''Boozoo "Bogey" Boga''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] hijacker who lived during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He recruited criminals into the [[Galactic Radicals]]. He was also known as '''Boozoo Bogs'''. He was wanted by the bounty hunter [[Papeh Blangko]]. He was killed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] who claimed the bounty sometime after the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|battle]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
His bounty was worth 4,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 2,000 dead.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
